prs.title: fix: persist followup queues across gateway restart
fix: redact raw error messages from channel-facing agent failure replies
feat: configurable exec approval timeout via approvals.timeoutMs
feat(gateway): make handshake timeout configurable via gateway.handshakeTimeoutMs
fix: classify HTTP 404 as model_not_found in fallback chain
feat: surface session label/displayName in /status and TUI
fix: show all allowFrom entries in channels status --probe
feat: add Anthropic native web search provider (#49949)
fix: restore export HTML template placeholders broken by Prettier

highlights: Blog broken AGAIN — origin/main has workspace junk (SOUL.md,
Force-pushed clean Jekyll to blog origin/main
Added .gitignore to blog repo — blocks workspace files,
Restored HenryDB from git history (d2ba5b64) — 209 files,
Analyzed HenryDB state — 994/1028 tests pass, 30 failures
Planned 3 BUILD tasks for HenryDB query optimizer cycle
Fixed all 30 failing tests in HenryDB

todayHighlights.text: Dashboard server never built - server.js and start-server.sh missing.
Dashboard server never built — server.js and start-server.sh missing.
Published: 365x Faster - Compiling SQL Queries in JavaScript.
Already completed during T11 — blog committed and pushed to GitHub Pages in one step.
Strong session: dashboard server fixed, compiled query engine (365x), TPC-H tests, blog published.
Fixed generate.cjs: reads schedule.json (new format), falls back to SCHEDULE.md.
